CustomField.formula: HOMEtracker__Property__r.Municipality_Name__r.Name + BR() + TEXT(HOMEtracker__Property__r.HOMEtracker__Number_of_Bedrooms__c) + " Bedroom " + TEXT(HOMEtracker__Property__r.HOMEtracker__Property_Type__c) + BR() + "Income Level: "+ TEXT(HOMEtracker__Property__r.Income_Level__c) + BR() + IF(HOMEtracker__Property__r.RecordType.DeveloperName="Homeownership", "List Price: $" + IF(HOMEtracker__Property__r.HOMEtracker__List_Price__c >= 1000000, TEXT(FLOOR(HOMEtracker__Property__r.HOMEtracker__List_Price__c / 1000000)) + ",", "") + IF(HOMEtracker__Property__r.HOMEtracker__List_Price__c >= 1000, RIGHT(TEXT(FLOOR(HOMEtracker__Property__r.HOMEtracker__List_Price__c / 1000)), 3) + ",", "") + RIGHT(TEXT(FLOOR(HOMEtracker__Property__r.HOMEtracker__List_Price__c)), 3) , "$" + IF(HOMEtracker__Property__r.HOMEtracker__Monthly_Rent__c >= 1000, TEXT(FLOOR(HOMEtracker__Property__r.HOMEtracker__Monthly_Rent__c/ 1000)) + ",", "") + RIGHT(TEXT(FLOOR(HOMEtracker__Property__r.HOMEtracker__Monthly_Rent__c)), 3) + "/month" )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Used in Application Response email template
CustomField.label: Property Description
